summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TARIC AI application. Backend APIs are 95% functional with excellent AI integration. However, critical frontend issue blocks all dashboard functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 when no token provided

critical_bugs.issue: SelectItem component error: 'must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
critical_bugs.impact: BLOCKS entire dashboard - users cannot access any TARIC search functionality
critical_bugs.root_cause: Empty string value in countries array: { code: '', name: 'Seleccionar país (opcional)' }

ui_bugs.issue: Error overlay completely blocks UI interaction
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot access search tabs, input fields, or any dashboard features

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and navigation
TARIC search with AI analysis (backend API working)
User authentication and JWT token handling
All backend CRUD operations for search results
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SelectItem component error in DashboardPage.jsx. Replace empty string value in countries array with a non-empty default value (e.g., 'ALL' or 'NONE') to resolve the React runtime error that blocks entire dashboard UI.
